title: Nostalgia+
description: a programmer art texture pack, this take textures from directly the 1.13 (the last update with the old textures) and recreated them to the new versions (actually 26.3)
body:
_This pack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by bringing back the classic "Programmer Art" textures from Minecraft 1.13 to the latest_

this pack must be used over top of the "Programmer Art" resourcepack

Key Features:

**_Classic Programmer Art: Revives the beloved textures of early Minecraft versions, offering a nostalgic experience for long-time players._**

**_Comprehensive Changes: Includes updates to textures, sounds, lighting, and more, allowing you to immerse yourself in the retro Minecraft atmosphere._**

**_Easy Installation: Ensure the "Programmer Art" resource pack is enabled and apply Nostalgia+ over it. For the best experience, it’s recommended to use OptiFine._**

**_Regular Updates: As Minecraft evolves, Nostalgia+ will continue to receive updates, ensuring compatibility with new game versions and maintaining its classic appeal._**




﻿the universe said you are the universe tasting itself, talking to itself, reading its own code and the universe said I love you because you are love.






New Ad-dons

https://www.mediafire.com/file/kp7lj2vb4yf5bxj/Netherite_To_Diamond_P.A.zip/file

*_Why Nostalgia+? Since Minecraft 1.13, Mojang has introduced smoother and more polished textures, which have changed the essence of the game. For veteran players, the original textures and the "Programmer Art" aesthetic have become a symbol of Minecraft’s roots. This pack aims to preserve that essence and bring back the old Minecraft feeling._*

*_Feel free to use Nostalgia+ and enjoy a trip down memory lane with textures that celebrate the early days of the game.
I’d Appreciate Your Support! If you like the pack, please leave a diamond and a heart! Your support helps me continue updating the pack as Minecraft evolves._*


*_As a self-taught texture pack creator, I’m always looking for feedback and suggestions. Feel free to leave a comment with what you'd like to see added or improved. Your input is invaluable as I strive to create the best possible experience for you!
Thank you for choosing Nostalgia+—I hope it enhances your Minecraft world!_*
